headline: Baker Hughes (BKR) Q1 Earnings Preview: What's in the Cards?
summary: Baker Hughes (BKR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Halliburton price target raised to $45 from $38 at Citi
summary: Citi analyst Scott Gruber raised the firm’s price target on Halliburton (HAL) to $45 from $38 and keeps a Buy rating on the shares. The firm adjusted targets in the oil and gas equipment and services group as part of a Q1 preview. The sector has “cross-currents” with the completion market recovering and companies with Middle East exposure brining uncertainty, the analyst tells investors in a research note.Claim 30% Off TipRanksUnlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter
